string-array.name: adult_lines
string-array.item: There goes Billy again. Poor insane kid.
Aren\'t we supposed to have limbs?
"Her aim is getting better?" THAT\'S your punchline?
I wanna listen to Sinefeld tonight!
I\'m bored! Wait is that allowed?
Family Matters again? Why can\'t we ever listen to something else?
Steer clear of the doctor. He\'s creepy.
I wish that shape would notice me…
This light is too bright for my eye.

string-array.name: child_lines
string-array.item: Cipher, Cipher, he\'s insane! Starting fires with his brain!
I can\'t molt now, I\'m at school!
I wonder if I can walk all the way back around…
Don\'t talk to that kid, he\'s craaaazy.
What if Billy sets ME on fire?!
Have you heard about the Cipher kid?
I\'m gonna steal the freak\'s sandwich!
Where does the light come from? Why do I have to be quiet?

string-array.name: scalene_lines
string-array.item: Rock a bye Billy, please don\'t you cry…
I\'m sure it\'s not his fault.
If you take your medicine, we can spend all day at the park.
You\'re going to change the world, Billy.
No matter what happens, I will ALWAYS love you.
You can\'t tell the doctor about this.

string-array.name: euclid_lines
string-array.item: You know better than to talk about this!
He\'s not a child anymore, Scalene!
If word of this gets out…
He needs to take his medicine before he says something we can\'t take back.
If you can\'t stop seeing it, you have to stop TALKING about it.

string-array.name: bill_lines
string-array.item: Mommy, you know I don\'t like the crusts!
Do I HAVE to go to school?
Someday, there\'s gonna be a parade for me.
Why can\'t I make them understand?
